name: La Marada
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork over medium heat until tender.
2. Drain excess grease from the pork.
3. Add ROTEL Tomatoes and Green Chilies and picante sauce to taste.
4. Cook until tomatoes are tender.
5. Reduce heat and add refried beans.
6. Simmer until blended well.
7. Deep fry 6-inch flour tortillas until light brown.
8. Top with meat, bean, and tomato mixture.
9. Add shredded cheese, shredded lettuce, sliced tomato, sliced avocado, and sour cream if desired.
